title: SQL: Floating point exception
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test (bla1 INTEGER, bla2 INTEGER, bla3 FLOAT, bla4 VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO test (bla1, bla2, bla3, bla4) VALUES (1, 1, NULL, 'test1');
INSERT INTO test (bla1, bla2, bla3, bla4) VALUES (2, 2, 3.5, 'test2');
SELECT CASE WHEN (bla1 - bla2) > 0 THEN 1.0 / (bla1 - bla2) ELSE NULL END AS result FROM test;
SELECT CASE WHEN bla3 IS NULL THEN 'No value' ELSE CAST(bla3 AS VARCHAR) END AS bla3_value FROM test;
key_bug_features: Division by zero in SQL case statement
